text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "ntdsutil.exe was executed with the 'ifm create full' command, which is a known technique (T1003.003) for dumping the Active Directory database (NTDS.dit) for offline credential extraction. The output path to C:\\Windows\\Temp is also suspicious.",
  "indicators": [
    "ntdsutil",
    "ifm",
    "create full",
    "credential dumping",
    "T1003.003",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp"
  ]
}
